summary: This document contains internal sales strategy notes written in Spanish regarding outreach to UK healthcare entities. It highlights failures in current email approaches and proposes alternatives like in-person visits or phone calls to Practice Managers and GP Partners. The text also notes challenges with tenders and slow response rates from PCNs and ICBs.
